reviews.review_description: Disappointed, wanted to use it to help teaching my sister for an exam. Navigation is horrible, and i can't figure out what to do. Of course it doesn't help that I physically have to interact with everything - cos the navigation is horrible.

developer_response.body: One navigates using the joystick and directing the hand towards the place you want to fly. Visit the user guide of our website to learn how to  create figures and handle the tools. If you need more help for something specific you can ask here or contact us directly through the website.

reviews.review_description: If you are interested in VR tools for teaching math at any level, you have to install Neotrie. From basic constructions to deep theorems, you can visualize and interact with lots of mathematical objects. Have you ever been inside a torus? Walked over a Möbius band? There is no room in this "margin" to enumerate all wonderful things you can do with Neotrie. Don't miss it!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your enthusiastic review. We are open to introducing new tools and functions that are useful in mathematics classes. We welcome your suggestions.

reviews.review_description:
Every geometric shape worth learning is here, from simple to advanced concepts, and intuitive manipulation in VR.
Should be a must have for all math classes in middle and high schools .

Tips for this and 200+ apps,
zzzzz 
bio 
link
(put “.” between the 3 terms above for link)

Or Google the term metadog

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review! We are working hard for a more powerful and stable version. Coming soon!

reviews.review_description: The best software for interacting with 3d Geometry! One can make geometrical figures as if they were real, in a few minutes. It needs some practice to dominate some of the tools, like the graphing calculator or the fractal tool.
This app is getting better and better!  Congratulations!
Excellent and hepfull tool in teaching and learning Math.

I’ve been using NeoTrie VR in my classes for 2 years. I have experience teaching student teachers, secondary and primary students. Neotrie is a great tool for designing and implementig inductive 3D geometry lessons. My students love the experience, they show interest and understand  important ideas by visualizing and interacting with 3D representations.

reviews.review_title: The best 3D software to work on geometry
reviews.review_description: Visualization in geometry is one of the most difficult skills to develop with right tools. Neotrie VR allows you to work on multiple aspects of geometry with all possibilities it offers. With an easy and pleasant inteface I recommend trying it¡
